page_title: 'fptcloud_tagging_resource Data Source - terraform-provider-fptcloud'

# fptcloud_tagging_resource (Data Source)

Use this data source to list **projects** or **VPCs** that can be used as tag scope targets (e.g. `resource_ids` in `fptcloud_tagging`). Data is read from the tag list-project-vpc API.

You can filter by `scope_type` (PROJECT or VPC) and optionally by `resource_names` (partial, case-insensitive name match).

## Example Usage

```terraform
# List all VPCs
data "fptcloud_tagging_resource" "vpcs" {
  scope_type = "VPC"
}

output "vpc_ids" {
  value = [for item in data.fptcloud_tagging_resource.vpcs.items : item.id]
}

# List VPCs whose name contains "TEST" (e.g. TEST_VPC_A)
data "fptcloud_tagging_resource" "vpcs_filtered" {
  scope_type     = "VPC"
  resource_names = ["TEST"]
}

# List all projects
data "fptcloud_tagging_resource" "projects" {
  scope_type = "PROJECT"
}

# List projects whose name contains "Test" or "DEFAULT"
data "fptcloud_tagging_resource" "projects_filtered" {
  scope_type     = "PROJECT"
  resource_names = ["Test", "DEFAULT"]
}

# Use first matching VPC id in fptcloud_tagging
data "fptcloud_tagging_resource" "target_vpcs" {
  scope_type     = "VPC"
  resource_names = ["my-vpc-prefix"]
}

resource "fptcloud_tagging" "example" {
  key          = "env"
  value        = "production"
  scope_type   = "VPC"
  resource_ids = length(data.fptcloud_tagging_resource.target_vpcs.items) > 0 ? [data.fptcloud_tagging_resource.target_vpcs.items[0].id] : []
}
```

## Schema

### Required

- **scope_type** (String) Scope to list. Must be `PROJECT` or `VPC`.

### Optional

- **resource_names** (Set of String) Optional set of substrings to filter items by name. Matching is **partial** and **case-insensitive**. For example, filter `"TEST"` or `"test"` matches item name `TEST_VPC_A`. If not set, all items for the chosen scope are returned.

### Read-Only

- **id** (String) Placeholder identifier for the data source.
- **items** (List of Object) List of items (projects or VPCs) after applying `scope_type` and `resource_names`. Each element has:
  - **id** (String) ID of the project or VPC.
  - **name** (String) Name of the project or VPC.

Returns an empty list when the API returns no data or no items match the filters.
